headline: Arjun Pillai led the team at 3.57/5; 35% of demos slipped into feature-selling and AEs averaged 3 interruptions per call.

top_5_product_gaps.gap: Real-time Slack alerts on detractor responses
Bi-directional Salesforce sync for renewal-stage variables
Custom dashboard widgets by ARR tier / segment
Sample CRM-variable data inside trial workspaces

top_5_process_gaps.gap: SEs not customizing demo env with prospect logo/data
AE interruption pattern derailing value delivery in 40%+ of calls
No structured pre-call brief between AE and SE
Pricing objection handling inconsistent across SE team
CX-maturity classification not used to qualify deals

ae_quality_risks.pattern: Interrupts SE on average 3.2x per call, primarily during value-delivery moments
ae_quality_risks.recommendation: 1:1 coaching + listen-back of 2 recorded calls; pair with strongest SE for next 3 demos

competitive_intel.where_we_lose: Price-led losses to Qualtrics in mid-market; capability losses to Medallia at enterprise tier where journey orchestration is required.

ceo_top_5_actions: Greenlight real-time Slack-alerts feature for Q3 — blocking ~$240K ARR
Direct conversation with Sales Leader on AE-interruption pattern; recurring derailment
Approve fintech & healthcare reference-customer recruitment program
Allocate ProdMkt cycle to publishable SOC2 Type II + segment-by-ARR dashboard widget
Fund Sales Enablement to build prospect-customization templates for SE demos
